title: ElevenLabs Voice
description: Represents a voice in the ElevenLabs platform, including pre-built, cloned, and designed voices with their associated metadata, settings, and audio samples.

category.description: The category indicating how the voice was created.

description.description: Human-readable description of the voice characteristics and intended use.

labels.description: Key-value labels describing voice characteristics such as accent, age, gender, and use case.

preview_url.description: URL to a preview audio sample of the voice.

samples.description: Audio samples associated with the voice, used for cloning and preview.

sharing.description: Sharing and publication status of the voice.

status.description: Whether the voice is shared publicly.

public_owner_id.description: Public identifier of the voice owner.

cloned_by_count.description: Number of users who have cloned or added this voice.

high_quality_base_model_ids.description: List of model identifiers that produce the best results with this voice.

VoiceSettings.description: Configuration parameters that control the voice's speech synthesis characteristics.

stability.description: Controls the consistency of the voice output. Higher values produce more stable, predictable speech. Lower values introduce more variation.

similarity_boost.description: Controls how closely the generated speech matches the original voice. Higher values increase fidelity to the target voice.

style.description: Controls the expressiveness and stylistic variation of the speech delivery.

use_speaker_boost.description: Enables speaker boost processing to increase voice clarity and reduce artifacts.

VoiceSample.description: An audio sample associated with a voice, used for cloning and demonstration.

sample_id.description: Unique identifier for the audio sample.

file_name.description: Original file name of the uploaded sample.

mime_type.description: MIME type of the audio sample.

size_bytes.description: Size of the audio sample file in bytes.

hash.description: Hash of the audio sample content for integrity verification.
